stocks.impact_theory: Expanded partnership with Oracle to deploy up to 2.8GW of fuel cells for AI data centers, with 1.2GW already contracted. Economic implications: Addresses exploding AI power needs amid grid constraints, positioning BE as key supplier in data center buildout. Market psychology: Reinforces belief in AI infrastructure bottleneck, sparking FOMO among investors. Historical parallels: Similar to GE's turbine deals in natural gas boom of 2000s. Analogies: 1) Selling picks and shovels in the AI gold rush; 2) Fueling the rocket ship of hyperscale AI expansion.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Stock surged 14-15% on announcement per multiple sources (Barrons, CNBC, Investors.com). X sentiment highly positive with mentions in watchlists alongside ORCL. Validates BE's tech for reliable, on-site power, critical for AI amid energy shortages.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 20-30% upside on further AI deals; target $32+ in weeks.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Deal execution delays, competition from batteries/solar, high valuation on losses.

stocks.justification: Concrete deal news with major partner (Oracle), direct tie to AI megatrend, immediate price reaction confirms sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: United CEO Scott Kirby pitched mega-merger with AAL to Trump officials, sparking speculation. Economic: Consolidation could cut capacity, boost pricing power amid fuel volatility. Psych: Optimism on deregulation under Trump admin. Parallels: Delta-Northwest merger 2008 post-fuel spike. Analogies: 1) Two puzzle pieces fitting for efficiency; 2) Airlines merging like telecoms in 90s to combat commoditization.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Shares up 5-7% premarket (Reuters, Barrons). X posts highlight rise on merger talks. Reduces competition, potential synergies despite regulatory hurdles.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 15% gains if talks advance; target $18.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Antitrust rejection, rising fuel from geopolitics, weak demand.

stocks.justification: Rumor-driven but credible source (CEO to officials), airline sector sensitive to M&A news.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 earnings beat: EPS $17.55 vs $15.92 exp, rev $17.23B up 14% on record equities trading. Economic: Strong IB/dealmaking signals recovery. Psych: Eases recession fears. Parallels: 2021 trading boom. Analogies: 1) Bank as market's heartbeat; 2) Trading desk as casino winning big.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Beat estimates (CNBC, WSJ), profit +19%. Mixed stock reaction but positive overall; X mentions in movers.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Macro slowdown hits IB fees, regulatory scrutiny.

stocks.justification: Hard numbers beat, start of earnings season sets positive tone.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 record trading rev $11.6B from Iran volatility, profit $16.5B. Economic: Banks thriving on volatility. Psych: Confidence in resilience. Parallels: Post-2008 trading surges. Analogies: 1) Safe harbor in stormy markets; 2) Volatility as bank's windfall.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Record results (X posts KobeissiLetter 1.3k likes), up 2.5% premarket. Ties to recent geo-events.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Rate cuts squeeze NII, credit losses rise.

stocks.justification: Blowout earnings with viral X buzz.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil prices pull back on US-Iran ceasefire hopes, energy stocks consolidate. Economic: Lower input costs aid consumers but hurt producers. Psych: Risk-off from geo de-escalation. Parallels: 2019 Iran tensions fade. Analogies: 1) Oil as geopolitical barometer deflating; 2) Energy sector post-storm calm.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Global rebound but energy down (STL.News, Yahoo). Ceasefire reduces supply fears; X quiet on XOM.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dip if oil stabilizes; 10% rebound.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Unexpected escalation spikes oil, demand surge.

stocks.justification: Sector-wide move tied to macro news, but oil volatile.
